name: MFA Fatigue / Push Bombing Actors
description: MFA Fatigue and Push Bombing Actors are threat actors who abuse multi-factor authentication workflows by repeatedly sending login prompts, approval requests, or authentication challenges until the victim accidentally approves one or accepts it to stop the disruption.
